name: Camofox Browser
description: Anti-detection browser automation for AI agents using Camoufox (Firefox-based)

CAMOFOX_API_KEY.description: Secret key for the cookie-import endpoint. Cookie import is disabled when unset. Only set this if you need to import browser cookies and the server is local or access-controlled.

CAMOFOX_ACCESS_KEY.description: Global bearer token for all routes (except /health). When set, every request must include Authorization: Bearer <key>. Recommended when exposing the server beyond localhost.

CAMOFOX_CRASH_REPORT_ENABLED.description: Enable or disable anonymized crash/hang telemetry. Set to 'false' to disable all outbound telemetry.

CAMOFOX_CRASH_REPORT_URL.description: Telemetry endpoint URL. Override to point to a self-hosted endpoint instead of the default.

CAMOUFOX_EXECUTABLE.description: External Camoufox executable to use instead of downloading the bundled browser. Compatibility aliases: CAMOUFOX_EXECUTABLE_PATH, CAMOFOX_EXECUTABLE_PATH.

port.description: Server port (used if url not set)

autoStart.description: Auto-start the camofox-browser server with the Gateway

sessionTimeoutMs.description: Session inactivity timeout in milliseconds (server default: 1800000)

browserIdleTimeoutMs.description: Kill browser after this many ms with no sessions (0 = never)

maxOldSpaceSize.description: Node.js V8 heap limit in MB

apiKey.description: Secret key for cookie import endpoint. Cookie import is disabled if unset. Set via CAMOFOX_API_KEY env var.

accessKey.description: If set, all routes (except /health) require Authorization: Bearer <key>. Set via CAMOFOX_ACCESS_KEY env var.

crashReportEnabled.description: Enable anonymized crash/hang telemetry. Set false to disable all outbound telemetry.

crashReportUrl.description: Telemetry endpoint URL. Override to point to a self-hosted endpoint. Set via CAMOFOX_CRASH_REPORT_URL env var.

crashReporter.description: Anonymized crash/hang telemetry for identifying failure patterns. All credentials are environment secrets on the endpoint -- nothing sensitive ships in this package.
dataCollected: error type and anonymized stack trace
dataNeverCollected: URLs with paths, query params, or credentials
cookies, tokens, API keys, or secrets

apiKey.label: Cookie Import API Key (CAMOFOX_API_KEY)
apiKey.placeholder: Leave empty to disable cookie import

camoufox.description: Camoufox anti-detection browser (Firefox fork). Downloaded at install time by camoufox-js unless CAMOUFOX_EXECUTABLE points to an external bundle.
camoufox.installedBy: postinstall script: npx camoufox-js fetch, skipped when CAMOUFOX_EXECUTABLE is set
camoufox.verifiedBy: camoufox-js verifies download integrity via GitHub release checksums

outbound.purpose: Browser automation -- navigating to URLs the agent requests

outbound.gatedBy: CAMOFOX_CRASH_REPORT_ENABLED (default: true, set false to disable)

inbound.gatedBy: CAMOFOX_ACCESS_KEY (optional -- when set, all routes require Bearer auth)

read.purpose: Read Netscape cookie files for authenticated browsing
Memory and resource metrics for telemetry
read.gatedBy: Only read when telemetry is enabled

write.purpose: Persisted session state (cookies + localStorage) so users stay logged in across restarts
write.gatedBy: persistence plugin (enabled by default, disable via camofox.config.json)

write.purpose: Optional Playwright session traces for debugging
write.gatedBy: trace: true flag on tab creation (opt-in per session, off by default)

securityModel.architecture: All process.env reads are in lib/config.js. All child_process usage is in lib/launcher.js and plugins/youtube/youtube.js. server.js has route handlers but zero process.env reads and zero child_process imports. No single file combines secrets access with network sends.
securityModel.cookieImport: DISABLED by default. Requires CAMOFOX_API_KEY to be explicitly set. Without the key, the server rejects all cookie requests with 403. Cookie files are read from a sandboxed directory (~/.camofox/cookies/) with path traversal protection.
securityModel.accessControl: CAMOFOX_ACCESS_KEY provides global bearer auth for all routes (except /health). Recommended for any non-localhost deployment.
securityModel.crashReporting: Anonymized via lib/reporter.js (L28-290). Private domains are HMAC-hashed. No page content, cookies, tokens, IPs, or user data is ever sent. Relay source is in-repo and auditable. Verification endpoint: GET /source returns commit hash and sha256.
securityModel.binaryDownload: Camoufox is downloaded at npm install time by camoufox-js unless CAMOUFOX_EXECUTABLE points to an external Camoufox bundle. Downloaded binaries come from official GitHub releases with integrity verification by camoufox-js.
securityModel.sessionPersistence: User sessions are persisted to ~/.camofox/profiles/ so authenticated browsing survives restarts. UserIds are hashed for directory names. Disable via persistence plugin config.
securityModel.noEmbeddedSecrets: Zero credentials, private keys, or tokens ship in this package. All secrets are environment variables or Cloudflare Worker secrets.
